3168620.name: Zombase
3168620.description:
Survive the Apocalypse

The city has fallen, the streets are crawling with the dead, and resources are scarce. Every decision matters: when to scavenge, when to fight, when to run. There are no scripted missions—just survival for as long as you can manage.

Base Building & Defense

Secure shelter in abandoned homes, or claim entire blocks as your own. Reinforce doors and windows, set up traps and barricades, and turn ordinary houses into fortified strongholds. Work alone or coordinate with friends to keep the horde at bay.

Vehicles & Exploration

Drive through the broken city to reach new areas, transport loot, or escape overwhelming swarms. Vehicles are scarce and fragile—finding and maintaining one is as valuable as any weapon.

Scavenge, Craft, and Fight

Search the ruins for weapons, food, and supplies. Craft improvised gear or upgrade your arsenal with whatever you can salvage. Firearms, melee weapons, and makeshift tools can mean the difference between life and death.

Day & Night Cycle

The world shifts as the hours pass. Daylight offers a fragile sense of safety for scavenging, while the night brings increased danger and relentless attacks. How you prepare for nightfall will often decide whether you live to see the morning.

Play Alone or With Friends

Face the apocalypse solo, or team up with others online. Cooperation can make survival easier—but trust comes at a price, and not everyone you meet will have your back.
3168620.supported_languages:
英语*
*具有完全音频支持的语言
